sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60671" key="kukni/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυκν-ίας</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀετός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, a kind of <sense id="n60671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white eagle</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:17:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.17.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
